title: Amazon Basics Stainless Steel Pressure Cooker with Steamer and Extra Silicone Ring, 9 litres
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: The stainless steel pressure cooker makes it easy to prepare delicious, nutritious meals in less time
Two cooking pressure levels: 50 kpa (gentle cooking) and 90 kpa (fast cooking)
Water level indicator for proper filling, securely connected Bakelite handles and quiet operation
Suitable for dishwasher design (except for lid), and suitable for all heat sources, including induction, flame and ceramic hobs
Convenient 9L size; pressure indicator valve for safe opening
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics We travel the world to find the best materials and designs for our products and use the most sensible manufacturing methods. We thoroughly test each item and rely on feedback from our customers to help us deliver the highest quality. Amazon Basics Stainless-Steel Pressure Cooker 9-Liter with extra silicone ring and steamer Make delicious, mouthwatering homemade meals with help from this Amazon Basics stainless-steel pressure cooker. Combining steam, heat, and pressure, the stovetop cooker traps in nutrients, moisture, and flavor for great-tasting results. The pressure cooker offers three convenient sizes, 4/6/9-liter with 22 cm diameter, and it works well for a wide variety of recipes, including soups, stews, chili, and curries, as well as risotto, meat dishes, and more. Cooks food in less time; maintains nutrients 2 levels for gentle or fast cooking Water-level indicator Secure Bakelite handles Quiet operation Dishwasher-safe (with lid removed) Suitable for all heat sources, including induction Pressure-indicator valve for safe lid opening Pressure regulator valve - 2 pressure levels Along with its handy water-level indicator and quiet operation, the stainless-steel pressure cooker provides two cooking-pressure levels: 50 kPa (kilopascal) for gentle cooking and 90 kPa for fast cooking. The cooker offers securely connected Bakelite handles, and it can be safely used on all heat sources, including induction, flame, and ceramic stove tops. With the lid removed, the slow cooker can go in the dishwasher for quick, hassle-free cleanup. Safety Valve / Pressure Indicator The pressure cooker’s safety valve automatically checks the inside pressure. When the cooker’s inside pressure increases, the valve post will rise up and the red cap will appear from the hole in the handle. When the cooker’s inside pressure falls to a safe level, the valve will visibly drop, letting you know it’s okay to open the lid. The safety valve automatically emits over pressure to ensure safe operation. If the lid isn’t locked properly, the inside pressure won’t rise, and the safety valve will only emit steam pressure; in this case, simply stop heating and lock the lid properly. Shorter Cooking Time Food cooks substantially faster in the pressure cooker (compared to normal cookers). Beef cooks in just 10% of the time it would normally take, for example, and red beans take only half the time. Get dinner on the table faster with help from the AmazonBasics pressure cooker. Note: cooking times vary for different foods. Energy Efficient The pressure cooker cooks beef using only 1/15 of the heating energy typically required, and it can cook red beans with only 1/3 of the normal energy needed. By cooking at higher temperatures, the pressure cooker cooks faster, which helps save time and energy. Maintains Nutrients Pressure-cooking maintains the maximum nutritional value of food because it not only requires smaller amounts of liquid to start with, but it also loses minimal liquids during the cooking process. The result: healthy, delicious food without the loss of valuable nutrients. Tenderizes Food The cooker’s higher pressure forces heat through the food, which increases the tenderizing effects of cooking beef, shanks, brisket, and other tough foods. No need to beat meat with a mallet or marinate it for hours on end. Conveniently leave tenderizing to the pressure cooker. 4-Liter Pressure Cooker 6-Liter Pressure Cooker 9-Liter Pressure Cooker Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 16,136 4.3 out of 5 stars 16,136 4.3 out of 5 stars 16,136 Price £34.30 £ 34 . 30 £44.99 £ 44 . 99 £69.99 £ 69 . 99 Capacity 4 Liter 6 Liter 9 Liter Diameter 22 cm 22 cm 22 cm Dimension 43.82 x25.4x17.15 cm 43.82 x25.4x22.23 cm 43.82 x25.4x33 cm Weight 2.61 Kg 3.17 Kg 3.7 Kg Steamer Not included Included Included Hob Compatibility Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Induction, Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓
